2275760.name: Operation: Dead Man
2275760.description:
Operation Dead Man is a story driven single player and multiplayer co-op Milsim Zombie Survival Horror Game.

Operation Dead Man takes place in an alternate timeline of events dating back to the lockdown of 2020. However, this time the world and the infection has taken a turn for the worst. Lock downs didn't work, quarantines of heavily populated areas were established. You take part in the failed attempt at containment. The entire planet has plunged into chaos. Bodies being shot down and getting back up people turning into mindless flesh eating nightmares... Your journey will entail the initial unfolding of the disastrous outbreak, experiencing every moment in sheer bloody horror. You, as the player, will become a true veteran to the downfall of mankind. As the story unfolds your environment will begin to visually decay into a post apocalyptic wasteland. Nothing will be left, but a faint glimmer of life, and your skills in tactical combat. Gear up with your favorite loot and customize it. Modify your weapons to aid in your mission. You'll need to gather resources, follow orders, build a squad, and purge the world of the infection but most likely die trying...
2275760.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
